text: The app takes too long to load and freezes after login.
The navigation is confusing and I cannot find the billing page.
I love the clean layout and the dashboard is easy to use.
The text is too small and contrast is poor in dark mode.
Buttons are confusing and the checkout flow has too many steps.
Search is fast but the menu labels are unclear.
The app crashed twice when I tried to upload a photo.
Keyboard navigation does not work on the settings screen.
